items.title: Static audit
items.desc: Reads test code only - no runtime, no test execution

items.title: Fragility classes
items.desc: Sorts locators into fragile / stable / context / dynamic by shape

items.title: Coverage
items.desc: Shows what was classified and what is dynamic (the blind spot)

items.title: Why, not just what
items.desc: Explains why a locator is brittle - never auto-fixes

items.title: Duplicates
items.desc: Same selector in N places - fix once, close N

items.title: View filters
items.desc: Show only fragile, or hide a kind

items.title: Runs locally
items.desc: Folder analyzed in your browser - code never leaves the page

items.title: Open source
items.desc: MIT, no signup, no data collected

nextDesc: Candidates for the next version. Vote for what matters - it shapes the scope.

next.title: Mute a rule
next.desc: Soften or silence a rule for your project

next.title: My stable list
next.desc: Mark attributes you treat as stable

next.title: Delta vs last run
next.desc: Load a previous report - see what changed

later.title: Export report
later.desc: Save or share the audit as a file
